task_goal_rewrite: Wi-Fi is enabled and active on the Android device, ready to detect or connect to Wi-Fi networks.

checkpoints.description: Wi-Fi toggle switch is set to the 'on' state in either the quick settings panel or device network settings.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the Wi-Fi toggle switch in the enabled position (e.g., colored/highlighted) within the relevant settings interface.

checkpoints.description: Wi-Fi functionality is active, as evidenced by visible available Wi-Fi networks or a connected network status.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot displaying a list of available Wi-Fi networks, or a 'Connected' label next to a Wi-Fi network name in the settings interface.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied, confirming Wi-Fi is enabled and active on the device.
